title: senecio arnottii
intro: Senecio arnottii, also known as Arnott's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio arnottii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting the healing of wounds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also sometimes used in topical applications to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and other health issues.
